top_signals.title: Bitcoin cracks $60,000, sinking to lowest level since October 2024
top_signals.summary: The weeklong sell-off was exacerbated after a stronger-than-expected May jobs report Friday sent yields higher and pressured risk assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
